summary: FR-SLOT-06C Due Task Slot Preview A: Today surfaces up to 3 due-imminent task schedule prompts (real due date + positive estimate, overdue-first sort, dismissed-for-date excluded) and a READ-ONLY task slot candidate preview using task est_minutes as duration (no 60-min fallback). Migration 0007 adds nullable tasks.schedule_prompt_dismissed_on (ALTER ADD COLUMN, no rebuild). New GET /api/tasks/:id/slot-candidates (404/409/200, read-only) + PATCH /api/tasks/:id/schedule-prompt/dismiss (writes only the dismiss column, no updated_at on tasks, idempotent). slotCandidates refactored to a generateCandidatesFor core shared by events (identical behavior) and generateTaskSlotCandidates; addDays moved to utils. Frontend task prompt cards render preview-only non-selectable candidates + dismiss; existing event flow unchanged. No task-to-event write, status/due mutation, scheduling, cron, external, or LLM. Committed 179e92a.
